variables.name: a_tenant_id
variables.description: Azure AD Tenant ID for Tenant A (Primary tenant for multi-tenant operations)

variables.name: a_client_id
variables.description: Service Principal Application (Client) ID for Tenant A authentication

variables.name: a_secret_name
variables.description: Azure Key Vault secret name containing the client secret for Tenant A service principal

variables.name: b_tenant_id
variables.description: Azure AD Tenant ID for Tenant B (Secondary tenant for multi-tenant operations)

variables.name: b_client_id
variables.description: Service Principal Application (Client) ID for Tenant B authentication

variables.name: b_secret_name
variables.description: Azure Key Vault secret name containing the client secret for Tenant B service principal

variables.name: key_vault_url
variables.description: Azure Key Vault URL containing service principal secrets and other sensitive configuration

variables.name: finopshub_root_path
variables.description: Root path for FinOpsHub Delta Lake tables in the Fabric lakehouse storage

variables.name: ado_organization
variables.description: Azure DevOps organization name for CI/CD pipeline integration and automation

variables.name: ado_project
variables.description: Azure DevOps project name containing the Fabric CI/CD pipelines and repositories

variables.name: tenant_id
variables.description: Primary Azure AD Tenant ID for single-tenant operations (same as a_tenant_id for compatibility)

variables.name: client_id
variables.description: Primary Service Principal Application (Client) ID for single-tenant operations (same as a_client_id for compatibility)

variables.name: secret_name
variables.description: Primary Azure Key Vault secret name for single-tenant operations (same as a_secret_name for compatibility)

variables.name: ado_artifactory_feed
variables.description: Azure DevOps Artifacts feed name for Python packages (pip) used in FinOps Hub notebooks. Must match the feed the package pipeline publishes to.

variables.name: ado_feed_pat_secret_name
variables.description: Azure Key Vault secret name containing the PAT used to install packages from the Azure DevOps Artifacts feed
